title: MrSellChests
description: Sell Chests, Boosters support multiple shops to get sell prices.
body:
*Older versions are not and will not be supported*
# *YOU CAN FIND THE PLUGIN DESCRIPTION AS TEXT BELOW*


# MrSellChests > Sell Chests, Boosters support multiple shops to get sell prices.
Click to view details ### 🚀 Supported Versions - **MC Versions:** 1.21.x - 26.x - **Server Jars:** Paper, Purpur, Spigot, Folia ### ✨ Key Features - Holograms - Chunk Collector - Trash Mode (Keep,Delete,Transfer) - Vanilla Inv + Sell Chest Inv - Physical Boosters - Pickup Feature - Inviting Players - In-Game Editor ### 💻 Commands | Command | Permission | | :--- | :--- | | `/msc help` | `N/A` | | `/msc reload` | `mrsellchests.reload` | | `/msc give [player] [sellchest] [count]` | `mrsellchests.give` | | `/msc boost give [player] [boost] [count]` | `mrsellchests.boost` | | `/msc banned ` | `mrsellchests.banned` | | `/msc editor` | `mrsellchests.admin` | ### 🛡️ Permissions - `mrsellchests.place.[SELLCHEST OR *]`: Allowing player to place one type or all types - `mrsellchests.limit.[NUMBER]`: Allowing player to place specified ammount - `mrsellchests.destroy.others`: Allowing player to destroy other sell chest owned by other player - `mrsellchests.open.others`: Allowing player to open other sell chest owned by other player - `mrsellchests.offlinesell`: Works if sell chest have offline sell disabled - `mrsellchests.chunklimit.[NUMBER]`: This permission allows the player to place a maximum defined number of chests in 1 chunk. - `mrsellchests.return`: This permission allows the player if he remove his island on supported plugins he get back sellchests in his inventory ### 🔌 Supported Providers - **MrUltimateShop** (Sell Price Providers) - **ShopGUIPlus** (Sell Price Providers) - **EconomyShopGUI** (Sell Price Providers) - **ExcellentShop** (Sell Price Providers) - **RoseStacker** (Stackers (Automatic Detection)) - **WildStacker** (Stackers (Automatic Detection)) - **MrUltimateGenerators (From 3.0.0)** (Full support for selling drops from generators.)
